jobs.name: Skill Scout
jobs.prompt:
AUTONOMOUS TASK: 技能侦察

【任务】
1. 运行 `skills_list` 查看所有已安装技能
2. 搜索 "openclaw.ai new skills" 或 "clawdhb new skills" 最新动态
3. 检查 skill-scout 历史：cat ~/.openclaw/workspace/memory/skill-scout-*.md 2>/dev/null | tail -30
4. 对每个发现的新技能做安全审查（exec/curl/wget/eval 等危险模式）
5. 写入 ~/.openclaw/workspace/memory/skill-scout-$(date +%Y-%m-%d).md
6. 追加到 ~/.openclaw/workspace/SKILL_SCOUT_SUMMARY.md（如有新技能）
7. git add -A && git commit -m "chore: skill scout $(date +%Y-%m-%d)" || true

【输出格式】
## 今日发现
- [技能名] - [功能描述] - [安全则附安装命令]
## 安全备注
- [发现的问题]
## 推荐
- [是否值得安装]

jobs.name: 服务器健康检查
jobs.prompt:
AUTONOMOUS TASK: 服务器健康自检

【系统检查】
1. uptime && free -h
2. df -h | grep -E '^/dev'
3. cat /proc/loadavg
4. ps aux | grep -E 'hermes|openclaw|cron' | grep -v grep | wc -l
5. ss -s || netstat -s 2>/dev/null | head -5
6. journalctl -p err --since "24 hours ago" --no-pager 2>/dev/null | tail -5
echo "---done---"

【格式化输出】
🖥️ 服务器健康报告 — $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')

⚡ 系统负载: [uptime]
💾 内存: [free -h]
💿 磁盘: [df -h]
🔧 进程数: [hermes/openclaw/cron进程数]
📡 网络: [ss -s]
🚨 最近错误: [journalctl输出，无则写"无"]

【提交】cd ~/.openclaw/workspace && git add -A && git commit -m "chore: 服务器自检 $(date +%Y-%m-%d)" || true

jobs.name: Hermes/OpenClaw 运行检查
jobs.prompt:
AUTONOMOUS TASK: Hermes/OpenClaw 运行自检

【检查】
1. pgrep -a hermes 2>/dev/null | head -3 || echo "hermes未运行"
2. pgrep -a openclaw 2>/dev/null | head -3 || echo "openclaw未运行"
3. pgrep -a node 2>/dev/null | grep -i 'openclaw\|hermes' | head -5 || echo "无node进程"
4. ls ~/.openclaw/logs/ 2>/dev/null | head -5
5. tail -30 ~/.openclaw/logs/*.log 2>/dev/null | grep -iE 'error|fail|timeout' | tail -10 || echo "无错误日志"
6. openclaw cron list 2>/dev/null | head -20 || echo "openclaw cron不可用"
echo "---done---"

【格式化输出】
🤖 Hermes/OpenClaw 运行报告 — $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')

⚙️ Hermes: [是否运行]
⚙️ OpenClaw: [是否运行]
📝 日志错误: [错误摘要，无则写"无"]
⏰ Cron状态: [任务数/状态]

【提交】cd ~/.openclaw/workspace && git add -A && git commit -m "chore: openclaw自检 $(date +%Y-%m-%d)" || true

jobs.name: 安全审计
jobs.prompt:
AUTONOMOUS TASK: 安全自检

【安全检查】
1. last -5 2>/dev/null | grep -v reboot || echo "无登录记录"
2. grep -c "Failed password" /var/log/auth.log 2>/dev/null | tail -1 || echo "无法读取"
3. fail2ban-client status 2>/dev/null | head -10 || echo "未安装fail2ban"
4. ss -tlnp 2>/dev/null | grep -v "127.0.0.1\|::1" | head -10 || netstat -tlnp 2>/dev/null | head -10
5. cat /var/log/auth.log 2>/dev/null | tail -20 | grep -iE 'error|fail|invalid' || echo "无异常"
echo "---done---"

【格式化输出】
🔒 安全审计报告 — $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')

🚪 最近SSH登录: [last -5]
🔢 失败登录次数: [grep结果]
🛡️ Fail2ban: [状态]
🌐 开放端口: [ss -tlnp]
⚠️ 异常: [有/无]

【提交】cd ~/.openclaw/workspace && git add -A && git commit -m "chore: 安全自检 $(date +%Y-%m-%d)" || true

jobs.name: GitHub Sync
jobs.prompt:
AUTONOMOUS TASK: Runtime Backup

Run the backup script to save memories/sessions/config/logs to git:
bash /home/ubuntu/hermes-all/scripts/backup.sh

Then check the backup status:
- cd /home/ubuntu/hermes-all && git log --oneline -1
- du -sh memories/ sessions/ 2>/dev/null
- Report how many files were committed and whether git push succeeded.

If push failed (likely network issue), just note it - the local git backup is what matters.

jobs.name: 每日自检汇总 10:00
jobs.prompt:
AUTONOMOUS TASK: 每日自检汇总推送

【读取今日自检结果】
cd /root/.openclaw/workspace

git log --oneline --since="$(date '+%Y-%m-%d') 00:00" --until="$(date '+%Y-%m-%d') 06:00" 2>/dev/null
echo "---自检commits---"

git log --oneline --since="$(date '+%Y-%m-%d') 00:00" 2>/dev/null | grep -E "服务器自检|openclaw自检|安全自检|科技新闻" | head -10
echo "---done---"

【格式化输出】
📋 每日自检汇总 — $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')

🖥️ 服务器: [正常运行/有异常]
🤖 Hermes/OpenClaw: [状态]
🔒 安全: [状态]
📰 今日科技新闻: [已推送/未推送]

⚠️ 需关注项: [如有]
✅ 整体状态: [正常/需关注]

——

【提交】cd ~/.openclaw/workspace && git add -A && git commit -m "chore: 每日自检汇总 $(date +%Y-%m-%d)" || true

jobs.name: 晨间科技要闻 08:30
jobs.prompt:
AUTONOMOUS TASK: 每日科技要闻推送（晨间）

【使用 Playwright 抓取搜索结果】
node /root/.hermes/skills/openclaw-imports/playwright-scraper-skill/scripts/playwright-simple.js "https://www.google.com/search?q=AI+科技+新闻+2026&hl=zh-CN"

【解析输出】提取标题、摘要，整理5-8条

【防重复】git log --oneline -1 --grep="晨间科技新闻 $(date +%Y-%m-%d)"，有则跳过

【发送格式】
🌅 晨间科技播报 — $(date '+%Y-%m-%d')

1. [标题] - [一句话]
2. [标题] - [一句话]
...

【提交】cd ~/.openclaw/workspace && git add -A && git commit -m "chore: 晨间科技新闻 $(date +%Y-%m-%d)" || true

node /root/.hermes/skills/openclaw-imports/playwright-scraper-skill/scripts/playwright-simple.js "https://www.google.com/search?q=半导体+芯片+动态+2026&hl=zh-CN"

【解析输出】提取标题、摘要，整理5-8条

【发送格式】

【提交】cd ~/.openclaw/workspace && git add -A && git commit -m "chore: 晚间科技新闻 $(date +%Y-%m-%d)" || true
